hero.label: Hero
hero.title: Building & Validating Multiple Products
hero.description: Lean Startup Studio — We rapidly validate ideas, scale what works, and iterate continuously.
hero.descriptionFull: We don't build single products. We experiment with multiple digital products simultaneously to find market fit through speed, validation, and data-driven decisions.

method.label: Method
method.title: Lean Startup Studio Model
method.description: We use the Lean Startup methodology to build, learn, and validate digital products in an agile and efficient way.

steps.title: Validation
steps.description: We validate ideas with real customers before writing any line of code.

steps.title: Prototyping
steps.description: We create rapid prototypes to test features with immediate feedback.

steps.title: Iteration
steps.description: We continuously improve based on real data and market feedback.

steps.title: Scaling
steps.description: We scale what works responsibly only after validating.

philosophy.label: Philosophy
philosophy.title: How We Think
philosophy.description: We are not a product studio that bets big and prays for the best. We run experiments, learn quickly from data, and double down on what works.
philosophy.descriptionFull: Every project is an experiment with a clear hypothesis, measurable outcomes, and predetermined success criteria. We kill ideas before they drain resources, and scale the ones that prove their worth in the market.

items.title: Rapid Validation
items.description: We test hypotheses in weeks, not months. Landing pages, surveys, and prototypes before writing production code.

items.title: Low-Cost Experimentation
items.description: We preserve cash by failing fast and cheap. No vanity metrics, no premature scaling, just lean operations.

items.title: Continuous Iteration
items.description: Products that work are improved based on real user feedback. What isn't launched stays in the graveyard.

items.title: Data-Driven Decisions
items.description: We trust metrics, not intuition. Every pivot or persevere decision comes from real user behavior.

newsletter.label: Newsletter
newsletter.title: Get updates in your email

projectsSection.label: Projects
projectsSection.title: What We're Building
projectsSection.description: Explore our current projects and see how we help companies transform their ideas into real products.
projectsSection.noProjects: No projects available at the moment.

about.title: About Anti-Byte
about.description: We are a development studio focused on creating digital products with scientific rigor and Lean Startup methodology.

aboutMission.label: // OUR MISSION
aboutMission.title: Transform Ideas Into Scalable Products
aboutMission.description: We're not just a development agency or a traditional startup. We're an Applied Innovation Laboratory where we apply scientific rigor to the creative process of building digital products.

beliefs.title: The market rewards consistent execution, not brilliant ideas
beliefs.description: We believe ideas alone don't create value - it's consistent execution that transforms concepts into tangible results.

beliefs.title: Early validation prevents waste and accelerates learning
beliefs.description: We rapidly test our hypotheses with real users, avoiding months of development toward the wrong problem.

beliefs.title: Technical quality is not a luxury - it enables sustainable scalability
beliefs.description: Solid architecture and clean code are not extravagances, they're fundamental requirements for growing without breaking.

beliefs.title: Human-centered design and technical excellence are complementary forces
beliefs.description: User-centered experiences and technical excellence reinforce each other to create exceptional products.

values.title: Validation Over Opinion
values.description: We never build what we think people want. We test with real users, validate early, and iterate fast. Our confidence comes from data, not opinions.

values.title: Fail Elegantly
values.description: Mistakes are part of the process when done informally. We learn more from a failed test than from months of development toward the wrong problem.

values.title: Radical Transparency
values.description: We share what we build, why we decide, and what we learn. Our public portfolio includes archived projects with honest explanations of why they didn't work.

values.title: Deep Work
values.description: We eliminate distractions to maintain high technical quality. Our workshop is our temple. We invest heavily in tools that let us build fast without compromising excellence.
